review_history.summary: Initial read-only C00 review found three P3 notes: premature gate status wording, weighted-ledger generic UI profile mismatch, and missing direct lifecycle/review outcome assertions.
Re-review confirmed P3 fixes and raised one P2 requiring the weighted-ledger deliverable_type/UI-gate defer to be recorded as auditable repo evidence.
Final re-review confirmed the P2 defer is explicit, machine-enforced, and non-blocking; no P0/P1/P2 remains before production_ready promotion.

findings.title: Production_ready promotion still pending downstream evidence artifacts
findings.evidence: Expected sequencing at implemented state; claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are attached by this closeout before production_ready promotion.
findings.recommendation: No blocking action. Attach downstream evidence and rerun the full validation matrix before production_ready.

findings.title: Validator enforces defer-record shape but does not cross-assert the live weighted-ledger value
findings.evidence: Validator checks the explicit defer fields but does not cross-assert docs/weighted-implementation-ledger.json deliverable_type remains ui.
findings.recommendation: Optional hardening for a future generator-profile alignment pass; not required for this package-layout closeout.

parsed_review.review_notes: Final C00 re-review confirmed the weighted-ledger deliverable_type/ui generic UI gate mismatch is explicitly deferred as auditable contract evidence, the validator enforces the defer shape, no weighted-ledger hand-edit is required, no real data or product-state writes are present, root npm test includes packages/control-plane/test/*.test.js, and no P0/P1/P2 remains blocking production_ready promotion.
